title: cnicus undulatus var. canescens
intro: Cnicus undulatus var. canescens, also known as Hoary Cnicus or Musk Thistle, is a variety of the Cnicus undulatus plant, a perennial thistle native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain anti-inflammatory compounds, flavonoids, and terpenoids, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cnicus undulatus var. canescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
